data.executiveSummary: The frontend-web service experienced p95 latency degradation due to an N+1 query issue, resulting in prolonged request times.

rootCause.title: N+1 Query Issue Detected
rootCause.description: Traces revealed multiple sequential database queries (SELECT * FROM users_cart) being performed within single requests, characteristic of an N+1 query pattern and causing significant latency in service response times.

evidenceChain: Tempo tracing reveals multiple sequential SELECT * FROM users_cart queries in a single GET /api/checkout request.

timeline.event: Detected N+1 query pattern with multiple database calls in a trace for GET /api/checkout.

data.impact: Increased latency for end-users, leading to slower checkout processes and potential degradation of user experience on the frontend-web service.
recommendedActions: Implement eager loading for related database entities to resolve N+1 query issues.
Optimize database access patterns to reduce the number of redundant calls.
